roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION VACATE, P & A, DEC X2 FILED
PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL  MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/DAWT/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF OCTOBER 19, 2011/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:10-19-2011/X: SENTENCE DATE:10-19-2011/ /X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIALCONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WERE ILLEGAL AND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY,THE GUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON OCTOBER 19, 2011 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEAIS ENTERED, THE SENTENCE ENTEREDON OCTOBER 19, 2011 ARE HEREBY VACATED, //X: ORDER VACATING THE JUDGMENT OF CONVICTION AND THE SENTENCE OF OCTOBER 19, 2011 SIGNED AND FILED,/X: THERE BEING NO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNEDAND FILED/

/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 2D    /CTS 2   /PF390NEW/VF1/FOP1  3   MONH/LVAL/LCHEM/1463ALC/MPROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP//X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/
/CAL:PRETRIAL/INTORD:SPANISH/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/DEF:RESERVES THERIGHT TO DEMURRER/GTWM/987,2/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
